defaults.hook_text: HOW IS HE STILL IN THE AIR?
defaults.hook_cover_term: Cristiano Ronaldo leaping very high in the air for a header during a football match

videos.video_subject: How Cristiano Ronaldo's record header jump defies physics - he jumped two and a half metres high with nearly a full second of hang time, reaching the height of an NBA dunk
videos.video_script: Watch how long Ronaldo stays in the air. He launched two and a half metres off the ground, his head higher than the crossbar. That is the same height an NBA player reaches to dunk. And he hung there, frozen in mid air, for almost a full second while everyone else dropped back down. The defenders just stood and watched. He did this at thirty four years old. So the real question is,
